\tzpentry{ID3659}{Stress-Energy Tensor}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3659 introduces Stress-Energy Tensor as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Lambda_{\text{eff}} = \frac{8\pi G}{c^4} \lim_{t\to\infty} \int_{-\infty}^t \langle 0|T_{\mu\nu}|0\rangle e^{-(t-\tau)/\tau_{\text{cosmic}}} d\tau \end{equation}
